---
title: "01 — Download American Stories Data"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
```

## Download American Stories (1774–1960)

Download article-level data year by year via Python `datasets` library.
We call the system Python directly to avoid reticulate virtual environment issues.

```{r download}
library(arrow)

# Run Python download script (system Python has datasets installed)
message("Starting download via Python script...")
message("This may take a long time for the full 1774-1960 range.")

exit_code <- system2(
  PYTHON_EXE,
  args = shQuote(file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "download_data.py")),
  stdout = "",  # print to console
  stderr = "",  # print to console
  wait = TRUE
)

if (exit_code != 0) {
  warning("Python download script exited with code ", exit_code)
}
```

## Summary

```{r summary}
parquet_files <- list.files(DATA_PARQUET, pattern = "^articles_\\d{4}\\.parquet$",
                            full.names = TRUE)
message("Total Parquet files: ", length(parquet_files))

if (length(parquet_files) > 0) {
  info <- file.info(parquet_files)
  info$year <- gsub(".*articles_(\\d{4})\\.parquet", "\\1", rownames(info))
  info$size_mb <- round(info$size / 1e6, 1)
  message("Total size: ", round(sum(info$size) / 1e9, 2), " GB")

  years_available <- sort(info$year)
  cat("Years available:", years_available[1], "to",
      years_available[length(years_available)], "\n")
  cat("Number of years:", length(years_available), "\n")
} else {
  message("No parquet files found yet.")
}
```
